Zero Hunger.reason: The course explicitly covers '傳統漁獵生活' (traditional fishing and hunting life) and '環境生態知識,' directly linking to indigenous food systems and traditional knowledge relevant to Targets 2.3 and 2.5.
evidence: 傳統漁獵生活、環境生態知識
